payload.answer: Duplicate Slack event delivery detected; no new memory committed.

entity_resolution.reason: The input indicates the same Slack event ID was delivered twice; duplicate delivery should not create an additional durable memory. The underlying fact is ambiguous without prior event state in this fixture.

details: Ignored duplicate delivery for the same Slack event ID.
No memory card created to avoid duplicating the fact: Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.
